case_title: REPUBLIC INDEMNITY COMPANY OF AMERICA VS. CASEY'S OFFICE MOVING AND SERVICES, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF REPUBLIC INDEMNITY COMPANY OF AMERICA AS TO DEFENDANT CASEY'S OFFICE MOVING AND SERVICES, INC. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-21-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-23-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-06-2003
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT; FILED BY PLAINTIFF REPUBLIC INDEMNITY COMPANY OF AMERICA SERVED OCT-25-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CASEY'S OFFICE MOVING AND SERVICES, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT; FILED BY PLAINTIFF REPUBLIC INDEMNITY COMPANY OF AMERICA SERVED OCT-29-2002, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT CASEY'S OFFICE MOVING AND SERVICES, INC.
NOTICE OF ACTION PURSUANT TO LABOR CODE SECTION 3853

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-05-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-21-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR MAY-26-2003. MAY-05-2003 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE JUN-06-2003.
ARBITRATOR RONALD P. SCHNEIDER APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JUN-09-2003 THROUGH SEP-07-2003.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-06-2003 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR RONALD P. SCHNEIDER
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON DEC-19-2003 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. OCT-06-2003 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REPUBLIC INDEMNITY COMPANY OF AMERICA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASEY'S OFFICE MOVING AND SERVICES, INC. $413,854.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $413,854.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-19-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CASEY'S OFFICE MOVING AND SERVICES, INC.
